landing.headline:
Your IdleMMO data,
actually useful.
landing.subheadline: ImmoWeb Suite connects to the IdleMMO API and turns raw game data into actionable insights — skill planning, economy tracking, and more.
landing.footer: ImmoWeb Suite — not affiliated with IdleMMO.

dashboard.title: Character Dashboard
dashboard.description: See all your stats, skills, and progression at a glance — more detail than the in-game UI.

skills.title: Skill Progression
skills.description: Estimate time to level up, compare skill efficiencies, and plan your grind.

economy.title: Economy Insights
economy.description: Track gold per hour, monitor market prices, and calculate the true value of your inventory.

combat.title: Combat & Dungeon Tracker
combat.description: Review world boss schedules, dungeon rewards, and enemy loot tables in one place.

secure.title: Secure by Design
secure.description: Your API token is stored encrypted and never exposed to the browser. All calls go server-side.

token.title: One Token, Full Access
token.description: Connect your IdleMMO API key once. ImmoWeb Suite handles the rest.

auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.saveFailed: Failed to save. Please try again.

overview.title: Overview
overview.noToken: Configure your IdleMMO API token and primary character ID in Settings to see your characters here.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account preferences.
settings.saveFailed: Failed to save. Please try again.
settings.name: Display name
settings.authChangeWarning: Changing your email or password will sign you out.
settings.languageDescription: Choose the language for the interface.

wip.description: This feature is actively being built. Check back soon.
